email.subject: Application received for Backend Engineer
email.body_text: Thanks for applying to Example Systems. We received your Backend Engineer application and will review it soon.

rationale: ATS confirmation for a submitted application.

email.subject: We received your application for Data Platform Engineer
email.body_text: Your application to Atlas Example Labs has been submitted. The recruiting team will contact you if your background matches the role.

rationale: Company career portal receipt for an application.

email.subject: Your application is now in review
email.body_text: The hiring team at Meridian Example Cloud has your Product Engineer application and the status is now in review.

rationale: Status confirmation after applying through a portal.

email.subject: Update on your Backend Engineer application
email.body_text: Thank you for interviewing with Northstar Example Robotics. We decided to continue with candidates whose recent backend systems experience is a closer match.

rationale: Rejection after an interview process.

email.subject: Application status for Data Analyst
email.body_text: After reviewing your application, Canyon Example Data will not move forward at this time. We appreciate your interest in the analyst role.

rationale: Direct application rejection from recruiting.

email.subject: We are moving forward with other candidates
email.body_text: Thank you for your interest in BrightPath Example Health. We are moving forward with other candidates for the Software Engineer opening.

rationale: Common ATS rejection phrasing.

email.subject: Sponsorship update for Frontend Engineer
email.body_text: We cannot support this role's work authorization requirements and will close your Frontend Engineer application. Thank you for considering Example Interface Studio.

rationale: Rejection tied to a role constraint.

email.subject: Phone screen for Backend Engineer
email.body_text: Can we schedule a 30 minute recruiter screen for the Backend Engineer role at Acme Example Tools next week?

rationale: Recruiter invites the candidate to a screening interview.

email.subject: Technical interview invitation
email.body_text: The engineering team would like to meet you for a technical interview about the Data Infrastructure Engineer opening.

rationale: Technical interview invitation for a specific role.

email.subject: Onsite loop schedule
email.body_text: Your virtual onsite for the Senior Platform Engineer role is ready to schedule. Please choose interview times with the team.

rationale: Later-stage interview scheduling.

email.subject: Backend engineer job opportunity
email.body_text: I found your public profile and think you may fit a Staff Backend Engineer opening at Example Grid. Would you be open to a conversation?

rationale: Inbound recruiter outreach for a possible role.

email.subject: Contract Python role
email.body_text: I am recruiting for a six month Python services role at a synthetic client and wanted to ask about your availability.

rationale: Agency recruiter asks about interest and availability.

email.subject: Interested in Staff Data role
email.body_text: Your experience with data pipelines could be a match for our Staff Data Engineer search at Example Signal Labs.

rationale: Company talent partner outreach before an application exists.

email.subject: Offer for Platform Engineer
email.body_text: We are excited to offer you the Platform Engineer position at Northstar Example Robotics. The written offer package is ready for review.

rationale: Formal job offer notification.

email.subject: Contract offer details
email.body_text: We would like to extend a contract Backend Developer offer and discuss start date, hourly rate, and onboarding steps.

rationale: Contract role offer with onboarding details.

email.subject: Coding challenge for Backend Engineer
email.body_text: Please complete the API design exercise by Friday so the hiring team can review your submission for the Backend Engineer role.

rationale: Take-home or coding challenge request.

email.subject: Take-home assessment invitation
email.body_text: Your take-home assignment for Example Analytics is available. The assessment covers SQL, Python, and data modeling.

rationale: Automated assessment invite for a hiring process.

email.subject: Complete the work sample
email.body_text: Before the next stage, submit the synthetic data modeling exercise for the Machine Learning Engineer application.

rationale: Work sample request before moving to the next stage.

email.subject: Next steps after your interview
email.body_text: Thanks for speaking with us. The hiring manager is collecting feedback and we will follow up next week with next steps.

rationale: Follow-up message after an interview without a final outcome.

email.subject: Reminder: interview logistics
email.body_text: This is a reminder for your scheduled technical conversation tomorrow. Please join the meeting five minutes early.

rationale: Interview logistics reminder inside an active hiring process.

email.subject: Checking in on availability
email.body_text: Are you still available for the product engineering process? The team would like to confirm your availability before the next interview stage.

rationale: Recruiter check-in during an active process.

email.subject: Saved job search results
email.body_text: Your saved search found five backend engineer jobs that match your filters for remote Python roles.

rationale: Job-search related email that is not tied to one application event.

email.subject: Candidate profile updated
email.body_text: Your candidate profile at Example Careers was updated successfully. Recruiters can now view your latest resume summary.

rationale: Career portal account notification related to job search.

email.subject: Virtual hiring event registration
email.body_text: You registered for the Example Hiring Day event with software engineering sessions and recruiter office hours.

rationale: Hiring event registration is job-search related but not an application state.

email.subject: Your order receipt
email.body_text: Thanks for your purchase. Your kitchen supplies order will ship soon and tracking will be available tomorrow.

rationale: Consumer purchase receipt unrelated to job search.

email.subject: Weekly neighborhood digest
email.body_text: Here are the top community stories, local volunteer updates, and weekend events for your neighborhood.

rationale: Newsletter content unrelated to applications or recruiting.

email.subject: Statement available
email.body_text: Your monthly account statement is ready in online banking. Please sign in to review recent transactions.

rationale: Financial account alert unrelated to job search.

email.subject: Appointment reminder
email.body_text: This is a reminder for your dental cleaning on Tuesday. Reply to confirm or reschedule your appointment.

rationale: Healthcare appointment reminder unrelated to recruiting.

email.subject: New shows this week
email.body_text: Explore recommended documentaries, comedies, and science fiction series added to your streaming queue.

rationale: Entertainment recommendation unrelated to job search.

email.subject: Flight schedule changed
email.body_text: Your flight departure time changed by 25 minutes. Review the updated itinerary before your trip.

rationale: Travel itinerary update unrelated to applications or recruiting.
